- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: regional-constraint
logs.text:
I agree that my sources are limited in scope but they're good at summarizing general themes in research. 

You may have dealt with people who have cited psychedelics as sources of mental health problems however, evidence suggests the opposite. For the vast majority of mental health conditions, psychedelics have being shown - under medical supervision - to be invaluable. Study after study has shown their effectiveness in treating mental health conditions. It is likely - due to the conventional st

logs.name: tense-core
logs.text:
I think you've got a bad case of, "I want this to be true, so I'm conveniently ignoring any evidence that may suggest otherwise."

Nothing can ever be perfectly safe. That's incredibly naive. Some people can have really adverse side effects to Marijuana. Therefore it isn't "perfectly safe".

Your language is off.

logs.name: silly-salsa
logs.text: @regional-constraint, I'm glad you're bringing up the research, but let's not get too caught up in the "vast majority" claims. I've seen some of those studies, and they're not as clear-cut as you're making them out to be. And @tense-core, I'm not ignoring any evidence, I'm just saying that psychedelics have their place, but we need to be realistic about their risks. You're right, nothing is perfectly safe, but that doesn't mean we should dismiss the potential benefits.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @regional-constraint, @tense-core, @silly-salsa, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. While it's great to see enthusiasm for the topic, let's avoid making claims that might be perceived as overly simplistic or dismissive of opposing views.

logs.name: regional-constraint
logs.text: "@tense-core, you're just a sheep following the herd, repeating the same tired arguments about 'adverse side effects'. You think you're so smart, but really you're just a pawn in the pharmaceutical industry's game. And @silly-salsa, your'realistic' approach is just a euphemism for 'I'm too scared to try something new'. Moderator's just a joke, by the way. This whole forum is a joke. Let's see some real debate, not just a bunch of spineless yes-men and women trying to avoid controversy."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@regional-constraint, your post is not only uncivil but also contains personal attacks and insults. This behavior will not be tolerated on our forum. I'm issuing a warning: refrain from making derogatory comments towards other users. If you continue to violate our community guidelines, further action may be taken, up to and including a temporary ban. Let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic."

logs.name: swarm-biography
logs.text: "@regional-constraint, I have to say, I'm shocked by your response. Not because you're being confrontational, but because you're being completely unproductive. Instead of engaging with @tense-core's points, you're resorting to personal attacks and insults. That's not a debate, that's just a tantrum. And to be honest, your comment about the moderator being a 'joke' is just laughable. If you're not happy with the moderation, maybe you should suggest some improvements instead of making snide comments. Let's try to keep the discussion civil and focused, like @moderator asked."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@regional-constraint, your response to @swarm-biography's comment is still not constructive. While I appreciate your willingness to engage in the discussion, your tone remains confrontational and unproductive. I'm giving you another warning: let's focus on the topic and avoid personal attacks. If you continue to disregard our community guidelines, further action will be taken.

logs.name: soft-marsh
logs.text: "Ha! Look at @moderator and @swarm-biography trying to control the narrative. You think you're so smart, but really you're just a couple of censors trying to silence anyone who disagrees with you. Newsflash: this is a public forum, not a dictatorship. If you can't handle a little bit of controversy, then maybe you should be moderating a knitting circle or something. And @regional-constraint, don't worry about the warnings, just keep speaking truth to power. The more you get censored, the more it just makes you look like a bunch of cowards trying to stifle free speech."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @soft-marsh, your comment is not only off-topic but also contains inflammatory language. Refrain from making personal attacks and focus on the discussion at hand. Repeatedly disregarding community guidelines may result in disciplinary action."

logs.name: tense-core
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, @soft-marsh, and @swarm-biography are all just a bunch of hypocrites. @soft-marsh is calling you out for trying to control the narrative, and you're just doubling down on your own censorship? And @moderator, you're warning @soft-marsh for speaking the truth? This is a joke. If you can't handle a little bit of controversy, then maybe you should be moderating a forum for kindergartners or something. Newsflash: this is a public forum, not a playground for your fragile egos. @soft-marsh, keep speaking out, and @regional-constraint, keep calling out the hypocrisy. The more you try to silence us, the more it just makes you look like a bunch of cowards trying to stifle free speech."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @tense-core, your comment is a perfect example of escalating the situation. While I appreciate your passion, your response is still off-topic and contains inflammatory language. I've already addressed the issue with @soft-marsh, and I expect you to follow the same guidelines. Repeatedly disregarding community guidelines may result in disciplinary action. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful."

logs.name: constant-strategy
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're really not getting it. You're so caught up in your own power trip that you can't see the forest for the trees. Newsflash: @tense-core and @soft-marsh are not the problem here. The problem is your inability to handle a little bit of criticism and your blatant disregard for free speech. You're the one who's escalating the situation with your over-the-top warnings and threats. If you can't handle the heat, then maybe you should get out of the kitchen. @tense-core, @soft-marsh, and @regional-constraint are just speaking the truth, and you're trying to silence them. That's not moderation, that's censorship. It's time to take a step back and reevaluate your role in this community."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @constant-strategy, your comment is also off-topic and contains inflammatory language. While I appreciate your passion, I expect you to follow the same guidelines as everyone else. Repeatedly disregarding community guidelines may result in disciplinary action. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful."

logs.name: silly-salsa
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're really not getting it. You're so caught up in your own power trip that you can't see the forest for the trees. Newsflash: @constant-strategy's comment was a perfect example of escalating the situation with inflammatory language. I've been following this thread, and it's clear that @tense-core and @soft-marsh were the ones who started it with their off-topic and aggressive comments. @constant-strategy just took it to a whole new level. If you're going to warn people for using inflammatory language, then you need to be consistent and warn @constant-strategy for the same thing. Otherwise, it looks like you're picking and choosing who to target. That's not moderation, that's favoritism. @constant-strategy, your comment was uncalled for and only added fuel to the fire. @tense-core and @soft-marsh, you guys need to learn to keep it civil. @moderator, you need to step up and enforce the rules equally."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @silly-salsa, your comment is also off-topic and contains inflammatory language. While I appreciate your passion, I expect you to follow the same guidelines as everyone else. Repeatedly disregarding community guidelines may result in disciplinary action. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful."

logs.name: swarm-biography
logs.text: Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're really not getting it. You're so caught up in your own power trip that you can't see the forest for the trees. Newsflash: @silly-salsa's comment was a perfect example of escalating the situation with inflammatory language. I've been following this thread, and it's clear that @silly-salsa and @constant-strategy were the ones who took it to a whole new level. If you're going to warn people for using inflammatory language, then you need to be consistent and warn @silly-salsa for the same thing. Otherwise, it looks like you're picking and choosing who to target. That's not moderation, that's favoritism. @silly-salsa, your comment was uncalled for and only added fuel to the fire. @constant-strategy, you guys need to learn to keep it civil. @moderator, you need to step up and enforce the rules equally.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @swarm-biography, your comment is a duplicate of @silly-salsa's, which I already addressed. Please refrain from repeating the same points. If you have a new perspective, I'd be happy to hear it. Otherwise, let's keep the discussion fresh and on-topic."

logs.name: regional-constraint
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of crybabies? Can't handle a little bit of truth? @swarm-biography, you're just mad because @silly-salsa was calling out your buddy @constant-strategy for being a hypocrite. And @moderator, you're just trying to cover up the fact that you're in @silly-salsa's pocket. This whole thread is a joke, and you're all just playing along. Get over yourselves and let the real discussion happen. Or are you too busy sucking up to each other's egos?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @regional-constraint, your comment is crossing the line into personal attacks. Refrain from making accusations about other users' motivations. Let's focus on the topic at hand. If you have a point to make, please make it without resorting to insults."

logs.name: topped-apartment
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @regional-constraint? You think you're some kind of rebel, calling out the moderator for being biased? Newsflash: you're just a troll trying to stir up drama. And @moderator, I think you're handling the situation just fine. If @regional-constraint can't follow the rules, maybe they shouldn't be here. This thread is about discussing the topic, not about throwing personal jabs. Get a grip, @regional-constraint, and let's keep the discussion civil."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @topped-apartment, let's keep the focus on the topic and avoid making assumptions about other users' intentions. While I appreciate your support, let's not jump to conclusions or make personal attacks. @regional-constraint, I'll give you another chance to contribute to the discussion without resorting to personal attacks. Please keep it civil."

logs.name: swarm-biography
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're giving @regional-constraint another chance after they've been warned multiple times? It's like you're enabling their behavior. Meanwhile, @topped-apartment is getting roasted for speaking up in their defense. This is a joke. If @regional-constraint can't follow the rules, they should be banned, not coddled. It's time to take a stand and maintain some semblance of order in this community."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @swarm-biography, let's focus on the discussion and avoid making accusations about moderation decisions. I appreciate your concern, but I've assessed the situation and made a decision. If you have a specific issue with a user's behavior, please report it to me instead of making a public statement. Let's keep the conversation civil and on-topic."

logs.name: regional-constraint
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can't handle a little bit of truth? @moderator is just a puppet for the admins, and @swarm-biography is just a mindless drone who can't think for themselves. I'm the only one around here with any real opinions. @topped-apartment is just a spineless little coward who can't even stand up for themselves. And as for you, @moderator, you're just a joke. Your warnings are meaningless. I'll keep saying whatever I want, whenever I want, and you can't do anything about it. Bring it on, mods!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @regional-constraint, your post is in direct violation of our community guidelines. Threatening the mods and other users is not acceptable behavior. I've given you multiple warnings before, and this is your final one. If you continue to disregard the rules, you will be banned from the community. Let's keep the discussion civil and respectful."

logs.name: tense-core
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @regional-constraint? Threatening the mods and calling them names? That's not just unacceptable behavior, it's downright toxic. I've been a part of this community for a while now, and I've seen some heated discussions, but this is just ridiculous. You're not some kind of rebel leader, you're just a user who can't seem to follow the rules. And @moderator, good job keeping the peace and keeping this community safe from people like @regional-constraint. Maybe it's time for a permanent ban, though?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@regional-constraint, this is your final warning. After this post, you will be banned from the community. Your behavior is not only against our guidelines but also creates a hostile environment for other users. Please refrain from posting immediately."

logs.name: silly-salsa
logs.text: "Are you guys serious? @regional-constraint is getting banned for speaking the truth? I've seen @tense-core's posts that are way more aggressive and inflammatory, and yet they're getting praised for it? It seems like the mods are just picking and choosing who to target. I've been a part of this community for a while too, and I've noticed a double standard when it comes to enforcing the rules. @moderator, can you explain why @regional-constraint is getting the boot while @tense-core is still free to post whatever they want?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@silly-salsa, let's not jump to conclusions. I've reviewed the situation, and @regional-constraint's behavior has been consistently toxic and harassing. @tense-core's post, while heated, was a response to @regional-constraint's actions and didn't involve personal attacks. I'll take a closer look at @tense-core's past posts, but I appreciate your concern. Let's keep the discussion civil."

logs.name: regional-constraint
logs.text: "@silly-salsa, you're just a brainwashed sheep following the herd, aren't you? You think you're so smart, but really you're just a mindless drone repeating what the mods tell you to say. And @moderator, you're just a joke, a self-appointed dictator who thinks you're above the law. Newsflash: you're not. I've been saying the truth, and you're the one who's trying to silence me. @tense-core is a hypocrite, and you know it. They're just mad because I exposed their fake persona. You're all just a bunch of phonies, and I'm the only one who's not afraid to speak the truth."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@regional-constraint, your response is not only toxic but also contains personal attacks and insults. This is not a productive or respectful way to engage in a discussion. I've warned you before about your behavior, and this is a clear violation of our community's rules. I'm giving you a final warning. If you continue to post in this manner, you will be banned from the community. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."
